{{CargoRelic
|name=Tao Te Ching
|class_id=22313
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-17
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.11%)
|description=On Aug 17, 485 BC, Laozi recorded the classic Tao Te Ching at Hangu Pass.<br>Tao Te Ching is the first complete philosophical work in Chinese history. According to legend, Laozi rode westward on a water buffalo and was recognized by the guard Yinxi, who asked him to record his wisdom for the good of the country before letting him pass. Tao Te Ching is a short text of around 5000 Chinese characters in 81 brief chapters. Originally divided into two parts, the Tao Ching (chapters 1-37) and the Te Ching (chapters 38-81), it describes the speculations on metaphysics, polity, and morality of the old philosopher.
[Quotes]
The Tao that can be told of is not absolute Tao.
Out of Tao, One is born; Out of One, Two; Out of Two, Three; Out of Three, the universe is created.
Nature is unkind, it treats the creation like sacrificial straw dogs.
|fame=79
|art=68
|fth=60
|civ=109
|tech=46
|ss1=Snail DEF +30<br>Dragon Minion DEF +3%<br>In the Demon God Rocket Cabin:<br>> All device base effects +3%
|ss2=Snail DEF +40<br>Dragon Minion DEF +4%<br>In the Demon God Rocket Cabin:<br>> All device base effects +4%
|ss3=Snail DEF +50<br>Dragon Minion DEF +5%<br>In the Demon God Rocket Cabin:<br>> All device base effects +5%
|ss4=Snail DEF +70<br>Dragon Minion DEF +7%<br>In the Demon God Rocket Cabin:<br>> All device base effects +7%
|ss5=Snail DEF +90<br>Dragon Minion DEF +9%<br>In the Demon God Rocket Cabin:<br>> All device base effects +9%
|ss6=Snail DEF +120<br>Dragon Minion DEF +12%<br>In the Demon God Rocket Cabin:<br>> All device base effects +12%
|ss7=Snail DEF +120<br>Dragon Minion DEF +12%<br>In the Demon God Rocket Cabin:<br>> All device base effects +12%<br>Snail DEF +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Dragon Orb Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's CIV +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Legend of Laozi|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll, +40|orange}}
|3name=Pass for Hangu|3rec=54.97M|3atk=181719|3defense=121232|3hp=8921756|3weak=22749
|4name=Taoist Yinxi|4rec=67.44M|4atk=208015|4defense=138775|4hp=11266403|4weak=27167
|5name=Green Bull|5rec=81.06M|5atk=236736|5defense=157936|5hp=14257773|5weak=31086
|6name=Taoist Creator|6rec=95.74M|6atk=267697|6defense=178591|6hp=17520510|6weak=33706
|Arec=111.80M|Aatk=301562|Adefense=201184|Ahp=21669396|Aweak=36422
}}}}
